_doc: Manual corrections to the auto-seeded equivalence groups, applied by build-dataset.mjs AFTER ΔE clustering (see src/data/SOURCES.md). Anchored by stable paint ids (group ids are regenerated each build). relabel: rename the group containing `member`. split: dissolve the group containing each id (→ singletons). excludeMembers: drop these paints from their group (a group dropping below 2 members dissolves).
